name: Sahil M.
text: Nitin single-handedly transformed our DevOps culture. The ECS to EKS migration was flawless — zero downtime, zero drama. That's rare.

name: Rahul K.
text: The guy obsesses over cost optimization like it's a sport. Cut our AWS bill by 20% in under 60 days. I've never seen someone move that fast on infra.

name: Priya S.
text: Got my Nykaa offer because Nitin gave me brutally honest interview prep advice. He doesn't sugarcoat, and that's exactly what you need.

name: Aman T.
text: Best TT player in the office — and somehow also the guy who fixes your CI pipeline at 2am. I don't know how he does it.
